concerns.text: FR-010 mandates 'Process Duration' as a predictor feature. Task T016 (preprocessing pipeline) lists imputation, encoding, and scaling but omits any step to fetch, calculate, or encode 'Process Duration'. The task deliverable falls short of the FR it claims to satisfy.

FR-008 and US-1 require handling unstructured PSD data (images, raw curves) via OCR/extraction fallback or flagging. T014 only mentions 'scrape tables' using pdfminer.six. It lacks the specific logic to detect unstructured formats, apply fallbacks, or flag entries as required by the spec.

FR-009 requires an automatic fallback to Random Forest if GPR exceeds 30 min or 5GB RAM. T023 defines the monitoring wrapper but does not explicitly include the logic to 'abort GPR and trigger fallback' within the task description. The deliverable risks being a passive monitor rather than an active fallback mechanism.

FR-004 and SC-002 specify evaluation on a 'held-out test set'. T026 only mentions computing metrics on 'outer folds' (Nested CV). Without a task explicitly creating a distinct, static held-out split (if the spec implies one separate from CV), the implementation may contradict the 'held-out' requirement.
